questions.question_text: Consider the bar shown in Fig. 3. Determine the nodal displacements, element stresses, and support reactions. 60 N/mm 50 N/mm 75 N/mm Fig. 3
Consider the bar shown in Fig. 4. An axial load P = 200 kN is applied as shown. Determine the nodal displacements, stress in each material and reaction forces. Fig. 4

A composite wall consists of three materials, as shown in Fig. 5. The outer temperature is T0 =200C. Convection heat transfer takes place on the inner surface of the wall with T = 8000C and h= 25 W/m2.°C. Determine the temperature distribution in the wall. Fig. 5
A three-span beam is shown in Fig. 6. Given E=200 GPa, I=500x104 mm4. Determine: slope at B, C, D and E and vertical deflection at B and at the mid-point of the distributed load. Fig. 6
